text.title: google-ads-reporting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for google-ads-reporting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using OFFSET for pagination in GAQL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: GAQL supports LIMIT but not OFFSET. Attempting offset-based pagination will fail or silently return wrong data. Use search_stream instead.

failure-mode.description: Running an auto-pause agent that fires within the first 7 days of campaign launch or without an impression floor.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: New campaigns need time to accumulate data. Pausing too early based on low-sample statistics produces false negatives and disrupts Smart Bidding learning.

failure-mode.description: Retrying quota errors in a tight loop without backoff delay.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tight-loop retries on quota errors hammer the limit further, guaranteeing that all subsequent calls in the same window also fail.

failure-mode.description: Agent writes cost_micros / 1_000 instead of cost_micros / 1_000_000.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Results in costs reported as 1,000x the actual value. Alerts fire on every campaign, budgets appear exhausted, and the bug is not immediately obvious in large number output.

failure-mode.description: Agent uses metrics.all_conversions where metrics.conversions is correct.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: all_conversions includes every conversion action (including micro-conversions); conversions only counts actions marked "include in Conversions." The first inflates ROAS calculations.

failure-mode.description: Agent presents impression share as a percentage without multiplying by 100 first.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: metrics.search_impression_share is a fraction (0.45 = 45%). Displaying the raw value as "45%" is correct; displaying it as "0.45%" is wrong and will cause alarm where none is warranted.

failure-mode.description: Agent hallucinates GAQL field names not present in the API (e.g., metrics.spend instead of metrics.cost_micros).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The Google Ads API returns a generic error for unknown field names. Agents must validate field names against the API reference before running queries in production.
